name: Fat-Free Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 9-inch square pan with cooking spray.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, cocoa powder, cornstarch, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
3. In a medium bowl, stir sugar and water until the sugar is almost dissolved. Add egg whites and corn syrup; stir until blended.
4. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring until smooth.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool in the pan on a wire rack.
8. If desired, sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
